name: @kindoo/infra
description: Operator-run one-off scripts for the Stake Building Access Firebase deployment (backfills, ad-hoc maintenance, etc.). Deploy scripts and runbooks live alongside but don't depend on these packages.
//module-type: Intentionally NOT "type": "module" — sibling `ensure-version-gen.js` is CommonJS (uses `require`). Our ESM scripts use the `.mjs` extension to opt into ESM per-file.
